tooltip.earth_online_magic.notebook.use: Right-click to open the magic handbook: starter route, mana, arcane stations and JEI lookup.
tooltip.earth_online_magic.notebook.scop: Independent magic branch: content replication, not survival difficulty simulation.
tooltip.earth_online_magic.arcane_initia: Starter magic study: organizes observable magic into the shared mana value.
Right-click to study. First use raises the magic-route mana cap; later uses restore mana.
tooltip.earth_online_magic.arcane_body_w: Starter arcane body ward: stable magic buffers environment stress and fatigue.
Right-click to study. With Earth Human installed, this improves fatigue, temperature stress and tolerance.
tooltip.earth_online_magic.arcane_breath: Water breathing attunement: magic maintains breathing rhythm and extends underwater air.
Right-click to study. With Earth Human installed, this adds extra air capacity.
tooltip.earth_online_magic.material.rout: Magic material used in crafting, alchemy, rune carving, ritual conversion and JEI lookup.
tooltip.earth_online_magic.block.route: Arcane station: right-click to open the screen, insert material, and attune or convert it with local aether.
tooltip.earth_online_magic.arcane_focus_: Portable attunement aid: sit for full circuit efficiency, extra aether gathering and continuous focus. The configurable panel key also works without a mat.
tooltip.earth_online_magic.alchemy_table: Blends arcane dust, mana salts, aether glass and other basic magical materials.
tooltip.earth_online_magic.rune_carving_: Carves rune ink into copper plates, stone and ritual parts.
tooltip.earth_online_magic.ritual_pedest: Center anchor for small rituals. It works alone, but a 3x3 ritual circle strengthens it.
tooltip.earth_online_magic.machine.alche: Converts arcane dust, aether crystals and glowstone dust into mana salt, aether glass and starter arcane dust.
tooltip.earth_online_magic.machine.rune_: Processes rune ink, rune copper plates and ritual chalk into rune parts and ward notes.
tooltip.earth_online_magic.machine.ritua: Uses local aether to activate cores, salts and aether glass. A four-corner crystal circle with side marks works faster.
tooltip.earth_online_magic.aether_crysta: An aether crystallization node that raises the nearby field, suitable for alchemy areas and ritual circles.
tooltip.earth_online_magic.arcane_dust: A basic powder made by treating redstone, glowstone and amethyst as observable magic carriers.
tooltip.earth_online_magic.rune_ink: Conductive ink for stable rune writing.
tooltip.earth_online_magic.ritual_chalk: Marks ritual boundaries and node positions.
tooltip.earth_online_magic.crystallized_: Low-tier mana salt that stores weak magical charge.
tooltip.earth_online_magic.aether_glass: Transparent material that can hold weak aether flow.
tooltip.earth_online_magic.rune_copper_p: Copper conductivity combined with rune ink.
tooltip.earth_online_magic.aether_crysta: Stable magic-gathering crystal for ritual cores.
tooltip.earth_online_magic.dormant_ritua: Inactive ritual core that can be activated on the Ritual Pedestal into aether crystals or looped into ritual packaging.
guide.earth_online_magic.line0: [Fantasy Earth on Minecraft] Development build loaded
guide.earth_online_magic.line1: Positioning: independent magic branch. Magic is learnable, craftable and engineerable.
guide.earth_online_magic.line2: Start: craft this notebook from one dirt, any planks or any stone.
guide.earth_online_magic.line3: Base: redstone + glowstone dust + amethyst shard => arcane dust.
guide.earth_online_magic.line4: Stations: alchemy blends, rune carving writes, ritual pedestal anchors.
guide.earth_online_magic.line5: Compatibility: this mod runs alone and uses optional dependencies, shared mana keys and material routes for the Earth Online ecosystem.
guide.earth_online_magic.line6: Mana: magic and qi share one mana value. If Xuanhuan is also trained, both bonuses add up.
guide.earth_online_magic.line7: This is an in-development test build; recipes and values will change.
message.earth_online_magic.arcana.status: Mana: %s/%s (qi route +%s, magic route +%s; both routes can be trained together and add up).
message.earth_online_magic.notebook.fiel: Local aether field: %s (%s/100); main source %s, disturbance %s/45.
message.earth_online_magic.block.field: Aether field reading: %s (%s/100); main source %s, disturbance %s/45.
You understood arcane initiation: magical attunement can now become shared mana.
You review arcane initiation and reinforce the magic route.
Local aether field: %s (%s/100), attunement restored mana +%s.
You just attuned the field. Wait %s seconds. Attunement disturbs this chunk; mana salts and crystals are consumable recovery routes outside this cooldown.
Aether source: %s; this chunk is now %s/45 disturbed and will stabilize over time.
message.earth_online_magic.arcane_body_w: You understood Arcane Body Ward: magic now buffers body and environmental pressure.
You review Arcane Body Ward and stabilize the protection loop.
message.earth_online_magic.arcane_breath: You understood Water Breathing Attunement: underwater air and breathing capacity improved.
You review Water Breathing Attunement and stabilize breathing rhythm.
message.earth_online_magic.arcane_adapta: Arcane adaptation: ward %s, water-breathing %s, extra air +%s ticks, endurance +%s, mana restored +%s.
message.earth_online_magic.mana_consumab: You absorb %s and restore +%s mana; current %s/%s.
Mana is already full (%s/%s); no item was consumed.
message.earth_online_magic.human_recover: Earth Human link: fatigue -%s, torso/limb healing total +%s.
message.earth_online_magic.arcane_focus_: You sit on the focus mat and open the arcane view. Select a researched circuit for each cycle; press Shift to leave.
Someone is already attuning on this focus mat.
You complete your first arcane attunement on the focus mat. Your magic circuit starts to stabilize.
You settle your magic circuit on the focus mat. Stable aether slowly suppresses fatigue.
Local aether: %s (%s/100), mana +%s; fatigue -%s, body healing +%s.
message.earth_online_magic.practice.lear: You complete your first arcane attunement without a focus facility. The basic circuit is established; mats and ritual circles only improve stability.
message.earth_online_magic.practice.used: You complete one aether attunement where you stand. Free attunement works anywhere but is less efficient than a focus mat.
message.earth_online_magic.practice.lear: You complete your first attunement on a focus mat, where stable nodes close the magic circuit cleanly.
message.earth_online_magic.practice.used: The focus mat anchors perception nodes while aether completes one stable circuit.
message.earth_online_magic.practice.resu: Local aether: %s (%s/100), mana +%s; fatigue -%s, body healing +%s; method efficiency %s%%.
screen.earth_online_magic.machine.unsupp: This material is not valid for this arcane station
screen.earth_online_magic.machine.invali: These materials do not form a valid process
screen.earth_online_magic.machine.role.a: Dual-vessel blending: primary material and reagent combine under control
screen.earth_online_magic.machine.role.r: Clamped inscription: the reagent supplies ink or conducting energy
Central anchoring: the aether field completes conversion through nodes
screen.earth_online_magic.structure.ritu: Ritual circle formed: -12 requirement, faster work
Small ritual pedestal: 3x3 circle upgrades it
Pattern: ritual pedestal center, aether or amethyst clusters on corners, bookshelves/glowstone/redstone blocks/alchemy or rune tables on sides.
screen.earth_online_magic.redstone.alway: The station runs whenever input, output and local aether are valid.
screen.earth_online_magic.redstone.requi: The station only runs while powered by redstone.
The station runs without redstone and pauses when powered.
screen.earth_online_magic.redstone.toolt: Click the icon to cycle modes. Materials are not consumed unless processing can finish.
screen.earth_online_magic.handbook.title: Fantasy Earth on Minecraft Handbook
screen.earth_online_magic.handbook.subti: Magic, runes, rituals and shared mana
screen.earth_online_magic.attunement.sub: Aether fields, circuits and body integration
screen.earth_online_magic.attunement.pra: Stabilize one magic circuit at your current position. It uses local aether and has a cooldown, but requires no mat.
screen.earth_online_magic.attunement.lea: End continuous attunement and leave the focus mat. Shift also works while seated.
screen.earth_online_magic.attunement.foc: Balances the magic circuit and prioritizes mana recovery.
Trades mana efficiency for recovery and brief protection.
Maintains the breathing circuit, restores air and grants water breathing.
Study the matching notes before selecting this focus.
hud.earth_online_magic.focus.title: %s Focus
hud.earth_online_magic.focus.hint: Shift to leave · Stay seated to continue
recipe.earth_online_magic.machine.mana_s: Arcane dust crystallizes into stable mana salt with glowstone
recipe.earth_online_magic.machine.aether: Aether crystal and glass fuse into aether-conducting glass
recipe.earth_online_magic.machine.starte: Glowstone and amethyst blend into starter arcane dust
recipe.earth_online_magic.machine.geolog: A geological catalyst draws additional arcane dust from glowstone
recipe.earth_online_magic.machine.rune_c: Rune ink inscribes a stable circuit on a conducting material
recipe.earth_online_magic.machine.body_w: A body-ward circuit is inscribed into a rune copper plate
recipe.earth_online_magic.machine.breath: Aether glass seals a breathing circuit into a rune copper plate
recipe.earth_online_magic.machine.inscri: Rune ink inscribes ritual boundaries into a chalk core
recipe.earth_online_magic.machine.core_a: Mana salt awakens a dormant core and condenses aether crystals
recipe.earth_online_magic.machine.core_s: Aether glass and mana salt seal a new dormant ritual core
recipe.earth_online_magic.machine.substr: An aether substrate condenses into crystals in mana salt
jei.earth_online_magic.handbook.1: Right-click the Field Arcane Notebook to open the handbook. Dirt, planks or stone can craft it.
jei.earth_online_magic.handbook.2: Alchemy Table, Rune Carving Table and Ritual Pedestal each have JEI categories; the pedestal can form a 3x3 ritual circle.
jei.earth_online_magic.handbook.3: If a station does not run, check input, output space, redstone mode and local aether.
tooltip.earth_online_magic.familiar_cont: Raise stability to 3 with arcane dust, then use the contract to bind the familiar.
message.earth_online_magic.familiar.stab: Familiar stability: %s/%s. Use a contract when stability is full.
Stability is too low: %s/%s. Use arcane dust first.
message.earth_online_magic.familiar.cont: %s has been bound as your familiar. Right-click with an empty hand to change its mode.
message.earth_online_magic.settlement.an: This is the arcane anchor for %s. Residents initialize after the chunk is safely loaded.
